name: Cold Lemon Soup with Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a large saucepan; add salt to taste.
2. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs with a whisk or electric mixer until thick and frothy.
3. Slowly add the lemon juice, beating constantly to prevent curdling. Stir the egg-lemon mixture into the hot chicken broth; let cool and refrigerate.
4. Grate or julienne the zucchini; blanch in boiling salted water for 45 seconds just to set the color and remove raw taste. Quickly drain and run under cold water until cool to the touch; refrigerate.
5. To serve, mix the zucchini into the soup. Serve chilled; garnish with lemon slices.
